heading: Omitted
label: 29 to 38 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 29 to 38, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 29, , §§ 22, 23, , related to official bonds of notaries public.act June 6, 1900, ch. 78631 Stat. 329Section 30, acts , ; , , prescribed fee for issuance of notary public commission.June 6, 1900, ch. 786, § 3231 Stat. 333Dec. 16, 1930, ch. 14, § 146 Stat. 1029Section 31, , , related to duties of notaries public.act June 6, 1900, ch. 786, § 1831 Stat. 328Section 32, , , provided for protests of bills or notes by notaries public.act June 6, 1900, ch. 786, § 1931 Stat. 329Section 33, , , related to liability of notaries public for misconduct or neglect.act June 6, 1900, ch. 786, § 2431 Stat. 329Section 34, , , directed notaries to deposit their records with district court on resignation, removal or death.act June 6, 1900, ch. 786, § 2031 Stat. 329Section 35, , , related to duty of clerk in safe-keeping records deposited.act June 6, 1900, ch. 786, § 2131 Stat. 329Section 35a, acts , ; , , empowered postmasters to act as notaries public.Aug. 5, 1939, ch. 480, § 153 Stat. 1219Dec. 11, 1945, ch. 56359 Stat. 605Section 35b, acts , ; , , provided for signature and seal of postmasters acting as notaries.Aug. 5, 1939, ch. 480, § 253 Stat. 1219Dec. 11, 1945, ch. 56359 Stat. 606Section 35c, , , related to fees of postmasters acting as notaries.act Aug. 5, 1939, ch. 480, § 353 Stat. 1219Section 36, acts , ; , , prescribed fee for certificates issued to members of bar authorizing them to practice law.June 6, 1900, ch. 786, § 3231 Stat. 333Dec. 16, 1930, ch. 14, § 146 Stat. 1029Section 37, , , empowered Secretary of the Treasury to fix rates of dockage and wharfage to be paid for use of wharf at Sitka.act June 11, 1896, ch. 420, § 129 Stat. 413Section 38, , , related to repairs to wharf at Sitka.act Jan. 3, 1923, ch. 2242 Stat. 1106
